name: runway_traverse
description: Archetype traversal parity route: vehicle-adjacent outdoor (Runway, mission 3) — chosen over Streets (FID-0046 non-determinism OPEN). Bond walks forward, strafes right, then turns — deterministic movement exercising the level geometry/collision sim. gate:true: the durable ares-free gate is the paired determinism tape baselines/tapes/runway_traverse.ge7tape (3-run byte-exact, gate_routes_smoke.sh). NOTE: the paired ares stock capture does NOT exist yet (FID-0076: needs per-mission menu-nav choreography + unlocked EEPROM); until it lands, this route gates determinism only, and sense_trace_sweep --gate skips its stock comparison loudly. Capture recipe when unblocked: movement_oracle_capture.sh --route runway_traverse --native-full-trace, then compare_combat_trace.py --align tick.
